TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cliff_Alexander, title = Cliff_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cliff_Alexander} }

S.FORM: Cliff Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1995, byacing te 11 ru 16 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 111 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pqwasan biru spat 年級, Cliff Alexander sangka' mzyu mari pspung. 2010-2011 kawas Cliff Alexander sangka' Curie's krahu' pqwasan biru hlahuy. 12 byacing hiya ga sangka' cikay pspung. Alexander spi' mopuw pspung. maki Chicago (CPL) pspung, magal blaq balay 成績. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cliff Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1995, byacing te 11 ru 16 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 111 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pqwasan biru spat 年級, Cliff Alexander sangka' mzyu mari pspung. 2010-2011 kawas Cliff Alexander sangka' Curie's krahu' pqwasan biru hlahuy. 12 byacing hiya ga sangka' cikay pspung. Alexander spi' mopuw pspung. maki Chicago (CPL) pspung, magal blaq balay 成績. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨli** alexan*er ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa illinois~ɕ, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. pqwas~ɕan βiru s~ɕpat **, ʦ~ʨli** alexan*er s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨli** alexan*er s~ɕaŋkaʔ ʦ~ʨurieʔs~ɕ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ħlaħuj. ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħija ɣa s~ɕaŋkaʔ ʦ~ʨikaj ps~ɕpuŋ. alexan*er s~ɕpiʔ mopuw ps~ɕpuŋ. maki ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo (ʦ~ʨpl) ps~ɕpuŋ, maɣal βlaq βalaj **. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
